cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.interpretation: honest, independent, principled, fair, constructive criticism, objective, perceptive

cards.name: Ace of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: coldness, emptiness, emotional loss, blocked creativity, feeling unloved, gloominess

cards.name: Page of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects
